full_text:
Xi Yi 郤揖
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Yi (郤揖)was born in Yanshi county, Henan commandery. Surrendered with Meng Da to Wei and was given rank. Xi Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
